title: Wandering Santa Trader & Reindeer Llamas
description: Change your Wandering Trader into Santa and his llamas into reindeer for the holidays!
body:
## Turn your Wandering Traders into Santa & llamas into reindeer

- Llamas show their original vanilla color on their front, so you can still tell them apart while looking like Reindeer.
- Reindeer texture adapted from Minecraft Earth's "Jolly Llama" texture.
- Adapted the vanilla Christmas chest texture for llama equipped chests.
- This will effect _all_ llamas, not just the Wandering Trader's llamas.
